title: Pastel Bloom
description: Meaning: new beginnings. Soft petals open like a hopeful morning, carrying warmth, freshness, and quiet confidence.

title: Moon Garden
description: Meaning: peaceful dreams. Lavender florals float under moonlit calm, holding the feeling of rest, wonder, and gentle imagination.

title: Coastal Rhythm
description: Meaning: movement and freedom. Breezy waves and coral light suggest courage, travel, and the joy of flowing forward.

title: Festival Light
description: Meaning: celebration. Bright petals and festive marks gather like music, honouring happiness, family, and shared light.
